_reason: No program at Universite Laval's Faculte de medecine maps honestly to this platform's India/NEET-audience course catalog (mbbs, medical-pg, bsc-nursing, pharmacy, bds). Instruction is French-only, the M.D. is a DEC (Quebec CEGEP)-prerequisite entry program with a government-decreed quota overwhelmingly reserved for Quebec residents, and the international-applicant pool is effectively a single seat per year. See the .md file in this folder for the full research record and sourcing.
